title: Is there a way for DocuGen to format date showing the full month e.g September 30, 2021?
excerpt: @samicaracand Does docugen support date format of September 30, 2021? I saw your comment on another post and the work around you shared worked, but it does not show the full month’s name

posts.author: maemaebarcelona (Mae Barcelona)
posts.cookedHtml: @samicaracand Does docugen support date format of September 30, 2021? I saw your comment on another post and the work around you shared worked, but it does not show the full month’s name

posts.author: samicaracand (Sami Caracand (DocuGen))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @maemaebarcelona - thanks for the note!
I’ve just updated our help page to help you display dates like you mentioned:

DocuGen help center

Format dates

Are dates appearing shifted by one day in your generated documents? Check out our troubleshooting guide for how to fix this.  When inserting a date into a document using a placeholder, DocuGen will...

Let me know if it works for you!

posts.author: maemaebarcelona (Mae Barcelona)
posts.cookedHtml: This is perfect @samicaracand ! Thank you so much for your help. We are loving DocuGen and has been very useful to us!

posts.author: samicaracand (Sami Caracand (DocuGen))
posts.cookedHtml:
Glad to hear!
If you have a moment, it would be GREAT if you drop us a review here:
https://www.g2.com/products/docugen/reviews

posts.author: samicaracand (Sami Caracand (DocuGen))
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Mae – just wanted to let you know we’ve doubled your document quota to 500 docs for a couple of months

posts.author: maemaebarcelona (Mae Barcelona)
posts.cookedHtml: Wow! Thanks!!! keep up the good work!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
